text: Kick off! Mexico vs South Africa at AT&T Stadium, let's go 🇲🇽
author: futbol_fan_01

text: South Africa looking organized in the early press
author: bafana_watch

text: Both teams finding their feet, neutral start
author: wc26_live

text: Mexico building nicely through midfield, Lira pulling the strings
author: tricolor_news

text: Quinones making a real threat out wide, dangerous
author: mexfut_daily

text: GOOOAL! Quinones puts Mexico ahead! What a finish from Erik Lira's pass!
author: tricolor_news

text: Mexico score early! South Africa stunned. This is already going wrong for Bafana
author: sa_football

text: Not a great start for South Africa. They need to regroup quickly
author: bafana_watch

text: Mexico on top, South Africa struggling to get out of their half
author: wc26_live

text: Bafana need to respond, this early goal could be costly
author: sa_football

text: South Africa creating some positive moments now, Mokoena running hard
author: bafana_watch

text: Yellow card for Mokoena, silly foul in a dangerous position
author: wc26_live

text: SA giving away too many fouls, Mexico on free kick
author: sa_football

text: Good defensive block by South Africa, holding firm at 1-0
author: bafana_watch

text: Mexico maintaining control, South Africa trying to find their rhythm
author: tricolor_news

text: Yellow for Gutierrez too, both teams getting physical now
author: wc26_live

text: South Africa showing fight in midfield, Zwane looking lively
author: sa_football

text: Decent chance for Bafana, headed over. Encouraging signs
author: bafana_watch

text: Game is settling, Mexico happy to hold the lead and counter
author: mexfut_daily

text: South Africa pushing forward, this is an open game now
author: wc26_live

text: Half time approaching, Mexico lead 1-0. South Africa need to be better second half
author: sa_football

text: Alvarado almost doubled for Mexico! Great save from the keeper
author: tricolor_news

text: Half time: Mexico 1-0 South Africa. Comfortable for El Tri so far
author: wc26_live

text: Second half underway, South Africa looking for the equalizer
author: bafana_watch

text: Better start from Bafana, Sithole winning the ball in midfield
author: sa_football

text: RED CARD! Sithole off for a reckless challenge. South Africa down to 10 men!
author: wc26_live

text: Terrible decision from Sithole. South Africa's hopes just took a massive blow
author: bafana_watch

text: This is a disaster for South Africa. Playing 40 mins with 10 men at this level is brutal
author: sa_football

text: Mexico smelling blood now, will pour forward against 10-man South Africa
author: mexfut_daily

text: South Africa digging deep, organized defensively despite the red card
author: bafana_watch

text: Mexico probing but Bafana defending in numbers, hard to break down
author: tricolor_news

text: Mexico patient in possession, South Africa compact. Solid defensive effort so far
author: wc26_live

text: An hour gone. South Africa hanging on with 10, goal still needed to stay alive
author: sa_football

text: Mexico finding space on the flanks, South Africa's legs starting to go
author: mexfut_daily

text: Almost a second for Mexico! Alvarado's shot deflected wide
author: tricolor_news

text: South Africa tiring, Mexico turning the screw
author: wc26_live

text: GOAL! Raul Jimenez makes it 2-0! Alvarado's assist, composed finish. Game over for Bafana
author: tricolor_news

text: That's it. South Africa are done. 2-0 down, a man short, can't see them coming back
author: bafana_watch

text: South Africa's tournament hopes are fading fast. Heartbreaking
author: sa_football

text: Mexico cruising now, brilliant performance against a depleted South Africa
author: mexfut_daily

text: El Tri fans celebrating, this looks very comfortable
author: tricolor_news

text: South Africa desperate for a consolation, Zwane trying his best
author: bafana_watch

text: Another yellow for Bafana — Sibisi booked. SA falling apart
author: wc26_live

text: Mexico comfortable, game's done. Managing the clock perfectly
author: tricolor_news

text: Still 2-0. South Africa have nothing to lose but also very little left in the tank
author: sa_football

text: 80 mins: Mexico just holding on to the ball, South Africa chasing shadows
author: wc26_live

text: SA pushing forward desperately, leaving gaps at the back
author: bafana_watch

text: RED CARD #2! Zwane off for South Africa! Down to 9 men! Total collapse
author: wc26_live

text: South Africa with 9 men in an 88th minute World Cup game. A disaster of a night
author: sa_football

text: Absolutely shambolic defending and discipline from Bafana. Embarrassing
author: bafana_watch

text: Mexico fans streaming out early to celebrate, the job is well and truly done
author: mexfut_daily

text: 5 minutes of added time. South Africa's misery will last a bit longer
author: wc26_live

text: Montes completely out of control, going to get a card
author: tricolor_news

text: RED for Montes! Mexico also reduced, but doesn't matter. 2-0 standing
author: wc26_live

text: Full time: Mexico 2-0 South Africa. Convincing win for El Tri. Three reds, one yellow each
author: wc26_live

text: Great result for Mexico. Jimenez and Quinones doing the business
author: tricolor_news

text: South Africa exit the World Cup. Hugely disappointing campaign, marred by red cards
author: sa_football

text: Excited for this WC26 clash between Mexico and South Africa!
author: worldcup_fan

text: Mexico fully in control after that early Quinones goal. Great atmosphere in Arlington
author: wc26_scene

text: Decent first half but needs more goals. South Africa have to respond
author: neutral_observer
